title: Smash Insulated Lunch Bag, Fabric, 8cm x 18cm x 25cm, Blue
features: One main fully insulated compartment with zip fastening
High density thermal insulation to keep food cooler for longer
Soft top handle for comfortable transportation
Made from high quality, durable material. Features Blue IQ Antibacterial Lining that inhibits the growth of bacteria
description: From the manufacturer Smash It. Pack It. Love It. Say goodbye to boring lunch bags! Smash Lunch Bags combine style, durability, and functionality to keep your food fresh all day long. With insulated interiors, easy-to-clean fabrics, and bold designs, they're made for whatever your day brings – from school to the office to weekend adventures. Smash Insulated Lunch Bags Smash Insulated Lunch Bag The Smash Insulated lunch bag is available in a range of colours our insulated lunch bag lets you showcase your personal style while staying practical. Whether you prefer classic neutrals or bold colour, there's an option to suit every taste. There is also a Smash stainless steel water bottle to match your bag Easy to Clean Blue IQ Lining Say goodbye to messy spills and stains. Our lunch bag features a wipe-clean interior, making it effortless to keep it looking as good as new. Spacious Design : With ample room for your meal containers, snacks, and beverages, our lunch bag ensures you'll never go hungry. Convenient Carrying Handle Featuring a comfortable carry handle at the top of the bag for added convenience. Making it easily to tote it by hand . Durable Construction : Our lunch bag is built to withstand daily wear and tear. From busy commutes, school yard to outdoor adventures, trust that your lunch will stay secure and protected. Premium Insulation Our lunch bag is equipped with high-quality insulation to keep your food and drinks fresh. Say hello to deliciously fresh meals. Just add an ice pack to keep your lunch nice and chilled.
